_description: Dynatrace MCP connector for investigating application errors with skills and subagents.
_prerequisites: Dynatrace environment with OTEL ingest configured
Dynatrace API token with entities.read, events.read, metrics.read scopes
Dynatrace MCP gateway URL (or self-hosted Dynatrace MCP server)
GitHub repo with app source code (optional but recommended)
Azure subscription with target resource groups

lawId.ask: Log Analytics workspace resource ID (for Azure-side logs, or blank)

existingUamiId.ask: Existing UAMI resource ID (leave blank to create new)

existingAgentAppInsightsId.ask: Existing App Insights resource ID for agent telemetry (leave blank to create new)

githubAppClientId.ask: GitHub App Client ID for BYO App auth (starts with Iv..., leave blank for OAuth)

privateKeySecretUri.ask: Key Vault key URI for GitHub App private key (https://<vault>.vault.azure.net/keys/<name>)
